inputs.name: reservation.additionalQuestionResponses.0.prompt
inputs.value: Multi-Day Adventure Rentals minimum age requirement is 30+.

inputs.name: reservation.additionalQuestionResponses.0.answer
inputs.classes: rounded border-gray-300 checked:text-polaris-600 disabled:border-gray-200 disabled:bg-gray-50 disabled:text-gray-500 disabled:shadow-none checked:disabled:bg-gray-600 checked:disabled:text-gray-200 w-4 h-4

inputs.name: reservation.additionalQuestionResponses.1.prompt
inputs.value: Overnight rentals must be parked by 10:00PM.

inputs.name: reservation.additionalQuestionResponses.1.description
inputs.value: I understand that all vehicles must be parked by 10:00 PM in accordance with Moab’s quiet hours (10:00 PM – 7:00 AM) and our safety policy. Late-night riding is not permitted due to increased risk and community impact. Simply put—nothing good happens on the trail after 10:00 PM.

inputs.name: reservation.additionalQuestionResponses.1.answer
inputs.classes: rounded border-gray-300 checked:text-polaris-600 disabled:border-gray-200 disabled:bg-gray-50 disabled:text-gray-500 disabled:shadow-none checked:disabled:bg-gray-600 checked:disabled:text-gray-200 w-4 h-4

inputs.name: reservation.additionalQuestionResponses.2.prompt
inputs.value: Driver minimum age requirement: 25 years of age or older.

inputs.name: reservation.additionalQuestionResponses.2.answer
inputs.classes: rounded border-gray-300 checked:text-polaris-600 disabled:border-gray-200 disabled:bg-gray-50 disabled:text-gray-500 disabled:shadow-none checked:disabled:bg-gray-600 checked:disabled:text-gray-200 w-4 h-4

inputs.name: reservation.additionalQuestionResponses.3.prompt
inputs.value: MANDATORY UTAH OHV VEHICLE EDUCATION COURSE

inputs.name: reservation.additionalQuestionResponses.3.description
inputs.value: In order for you to operate an off-highway vehicle or street legal off-highway vehicle in Utah you must complete the Utah OHV Course. This is a once-in-a-lifetime, free, online course. Your confirmation email will include a link to complete the course prior to arrival. You must bring proof of completion/certificate before taking possession of the vehicle.

inputs.name: reservation.additionalQuestionResponses.3.answer
inputs.classes: rounded border-gray-300 checked:text-polaris-600 disabled:border-gray-200 disabled:bg-gray-50 disabled:text-gray-500 disabled:shadow-none checked:disabled:bg-gray-600 checked:disabled:text-gray-200 w-4 h-4

inputs.name: reservation.additionalQuestionResponses.4.prompt
inputs.value: I acknowledge that reckless driving, unlawful behavior, or taking the vehicle into unauthorized or restricted areas will void Max Out-of-Pocket Damage Protection and result in additional recovery and loss-of-use fees in the event of an accident.

inputs.name: reservation.additionalQuestionResponses.4.description
inputs.value: Adventure Assure provides peace of mind for the unexpected, covering accidental damage when you’re out exploring. But just like any great adventure, responsibility matters. Reckless driving, unlawful behavior, or pushing limits beyond safe operation will void your coverage. We’re here to protect those who ride responsibly—so gear up, stay smart, and enjoy the ride!

inputs.name: reservation.additionalQuestionResponses.4.answer
